Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Grandmaster Helgard]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Grandmaster Helgard is a bearded bear of a man.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 8''' — The new Grandmaster Helgard is bear-like.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Grandmaster Helgard has a bushy beard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 16''' — Grandmaster Helgard is a Grandmaster who suggests turning Talos over to Asphodel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 19''' — Grandmaster Helgard is the leader of a group of bearded men in heavy jackets.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — Grandmaster Helgard is a skilled Helgard Traveler and a shaggy man with a brown beard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — Grandmaster Helgard believes the reign of Ragnarus over all other Territories is unnatural and unjust.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 5''' — Helgard was a Grandmaster who was executed by the Elysian Incarnation.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
